name: Samosas
recipeInstructions:
For filling:
1. In a blender or food processor, grind together onion, ginger root, garlic, cinnamon stick, cardamom, cumin, and salt.
2. Break the cinnamon stick into pieces before adding it to the blender.
3. Add ground beef to the mixture and blend until well combined.
4. Cook the mixture in a medium skillet sprayed with non-stick spray until the beef is browned.
5. Add 1 cup of water and cook until the water evaporates.
6. Stir in chopped coriander leaves.
For pastry:
7. In a large bowl, mix flour with vegetable shortening until it resembles coarse meal.
8. Gradually sprinkle water (2 teaspoons at a time) into the mixture and knead with a fork until a stiff dough forms.
9. Shape the dough into an 8 equal pieces and roll each piece out into a 6-inch flat circle.
10. Cut each circle in half.
11. Place a scant tablespoon of filling on each pastry half.
12. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water, fold them over, and pinch together to seal.
13. Brush lightly with egg substitute for golden brown pastry.
14. Bake at 425°F (220°C) until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
